reviews.review_description:
TAC, despite being in quite the early stages of development and being made by a mostly busy solo dev, this game is AMAZING.
Yes, there are bugs, in which are quite gamebreaking, but ignore the bugs in which the dev tries to fix all the time, the game is amazing.
I explored all levels this game currently offers, chatted with the owner of the game, Tanek, blah blah. Anyways, I'd say this game has potential and may become the best level-based VR Gtag Locomotion game out there.
10/10 game.

reviews.review_title: Peakest horror game in VR history,
reviews.review_description: i might of beated the game, i reached the part till it had the computer that said press this button to quit. and also explored a map with elevator going down to the cave or something and seeing a bulky monster, the scariest had to be the red flesh monster, i know with B1 key i could of been to end, but i explored. Sad thing is me and my friend didn't find the red giant heart, i don't know if you can, i only did like 4 or 3 computers sending something in red flesh zombie level. I was too scared so i found crates and lever leading to elevator. This game was peak. Make more levels please, it was the best horror game i found thats good and fair. It was a journey.

Reactor burnt me i feel betrayed, tell the cockroach robots to stop attacking me and i will backflip, tell the tornado to stop bullying me and i will backflip again and why is the rock give jumpscare how dare they and tell evil crawler to stop backflipping, amazing game

reviews.review_title: HELL YEAH THE ABANDONED COMPLEX IS GOOD
